input: Crushing chest pain radiating to left arm with diaphoresis. ST elevation V1-V4. Troponin 1.8.
Anaphylaxis post bee sting, BP 78/48, O2 91%. Urticaria, angioedema.
RLQ pain, rebound tenderness, Rovsing positive, WBC 14.2k, CT confirms appendicitis.
Routine BP 145/92 follow-up, no end-organ damage, requesting medication adjustment.
Mild URI, sore throat, low-grade fever 37.8C. Flu/COVID negative.
